name: local-llm-mcp
description: State-of-the-Art MCP server for managing local and cloud Large Language Models with comprehensive tool suite

api_key.title: API Key (optional)
api_key.description: API key for external LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)

tools.name: llm_health_tool
tools.description: Comprehensive health monitoring and system management operations

tools.name: llm_models_tool
tools.description: Model management, registration, and provider operations

tools.name: llm_generation_tool
tools.description: Text generation, chat completion, and embedding operations

tools.name: llm_multimodal_tool
tools.description: Image analysis, generation, and comparison operations

tools.name: llm_finetuning_tool
tools.description: LoRA, Sparse, and DoRA fine-tuning operations

tools.name: llm_ollama_tool
tools.description: Ollama model management operations

tools.name: llm_lmstudio_tool
tools.description: LM Studio model management operations

tools.name: llm_vllm_tool
tools.description: vLLM high-performance inference operations

tools.name: llm_huggingface_tool
tools.description: Hugging Face model and dataset management operations

tools.name: llm_google_cloud_tool
tools.description: Google Cloud AI operations including Gemini models, Vertex AI, and Cloud Storage

tools.name: gpu_status
tools.description: Get comprehensive NVIDIA GPU status and monitoring

tools.name: gpu_clear_memory
tools.description: Clear GPU memory to prevent fragmentation

tools.name: gpu_optimize
tools.description: Advanced GPU memory optimization

tools.name: gpu_health_check
tools.description: Comprehensive GPU health monitoring and diagnostics

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List available models from configured providers

tools.name: get_model_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific model

tools.name: register_model
tools.description: Register a new model with the system

tools.name: generate_text
tools.description: Generate text using configured language models

tools.name: chat_completion
tools.description: Perform chat completion with context and history

tools.name: embed_text
tools.description: Generate embeddings for text inputs

tools.name: list_available_tools
tools.description: Tool discovery with 5 levels of detail (0-4)

tools.name: get_tool_help
tools.description: Comprehensive tool documentation and examples

tools.name: search_tools
tools.description: Advanced tool search with relevance scoring

tools.name: get_tool_signature
tools.description: Function signatures with type annotations and metadata

tools.name: get_workflow_guides
tools.description: Complete workflow documentation and best practices

tools.name: get_performance_guide
tools.description: Performance optimization and benchmarking guide

tools.name: get_troubleshooting_guide
tools.description: Comprehensive troubleshooting and issue resolution

tools.name: get_hardware_requirements
tools.description: Hardware recommendations and performance estimates

tools.name: get_quick_reference
tools.description: Essential commands, settings, and quick fixes

tools.name: get_integration_guide
tools.description: External system integration guides and examples
